race.description: Tony Sweeney Memorial Country Boosted Maiden Hcp
race.comment: KISSAVOS (4) was quickly back on track when placing here on a slow track. Has the 3kg claim today for an in-form apprentice. The one they have to beat. NULKABA STAR (10) has some ability but has been struggling to break through. He has a low gate today, and his best effort would give him a value chance. SWEET MARLENE (11) was tracking well before the latest and also has each-way claims. SUNSTAZ (5) went close this trip at Grafton at her only second-up outing. Has scope for more improvement and has can make the finish. MS WICKED SHOWGIRL (9) debuts and the markets suggest she'll go better than her trial finish suggests. Has a soft low barrier and keep a close eye on the late betting.
